auto_post_at.description: The account "available balance" at the time this hold was created

avail_balance.description: The account "available balance" at the time this hold was created (to be deprecated)

available_balance.description: The account "available balance" at the time this hold was created

balance.description: The account balance at the time this hold was created

currency.description: ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code of the transfer amount

effective_date.description: The effective date of the transaction once it gets posted

expires_at.description: The date that at which this hold is no longer valid.

force_post.description: Whether or not the hold was forced (spending controls ignored)

history.description: An array representing any previous states of the hold, if it has been modified (For example, increasing or decreasing the hold amount).

idemkey.description: The idempotency key used when initially creating this hold.

memo.description: A short note to the recipient

network.description: The network this transaction is associated with

reason.description: If a hold has been declined or modified, this will include the reason.

req_amount.description: The requested amount, in the case of hold modifications.

subtype.description: The specific transaction type. For example, for `ach`, this may be "outgoing_debit".

total_amount.description: The total amount of the hold. This may be different than `amount` in the case where a hold increase or decrease was requested.

transaction_id.description: The uuid of the transaction that this pending transaction originated from, if any. This is primary used when a transaction "posts", but a subset of the amount reserved until a future settlement date.

transaction_time.description: The time that the transaction was created

type.description: The general type of transaction. For example, "card" or "ach".

was_partial.description: Does this hold represent a partial debit (or credit)?
